feature: Photo to Comic P1.5-C: Character Consistency Validator
summary: All P1.5-C consistency validator features verified working: OpenCV FaceDetectorYN (YuNet) + FaceRecognizerSF (SFace) integration, face embedding extraction from real photos, no-face detection for non-face images, self-comparison returns ~1.0, validate_panel_consistency returns correct verdicts (accept/no_face/skip), run_consistency_validation logs to consistency_logs collection. Backend server running with consistency validator integrated. All regression tests pass (quality check, events, PDF, job status endpoints).

tests.name: extract_face_embedding detects faces in real photos
extract_face_embedding returns no face for non-face images
validate_panel_consistency returns 'no_face' for panels without faces
validate_panel_consistency returns 'skip' when source has no face
Backend server running with consistency validator integrated
Photo to Comic page loads at /app/photo-to-comic
File input found for photo upload
Quality check UI shows after photo upload
Quality indicators displayed (Face, Clarity, Lighting, Framing)
Generate button enabled when face detected

seed_data_creation: Used test images at /tmp/test_no_face.jpg (solid color) and /tmp/test_real_face.jpg (real face from Unsplash)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.5-C consistency validator fully tested. ONNX models at /app/backend/models/ (YuNet for face detection, SFace for embeddings). Consistency validator at /app/backend/services/consistency_validator.py. Integration in photo_to_comic.py at line 1237-1287 (after panel repair, before final status). Logs to consistency_logs collection. Thresholds: HIGH_PASS=0.45, BORDERLINE=0.30. Self-similarity returns ~0.9999999 (floating point). Cross-domain (photo vs comic) similarity typically 0.2-0.6.

verified_features.face_detection: YuNet model detects faces with confidence score > 0.5
verified_features.no_face_handling: extract_face_embedding returns (None, False, 0) for non-face images
verified_features.consistency_logging: Logs to consistency_logs collection with job_id, style, model_used, panel_details, avg/min/max similarity
verified_features.auto_retry: Panels with 'retry' verdict get max 1 auto-retry in pipeline
